# Release Notes v0.2.0

codexBot v0.2.0 turns the bridge console into a fuller Windows-oriented workspace for Codex + IM flows.

## Highlights

- New workspace binding page with default workdir, mode, and model strategy
- Thread detail upgraded into an Agent timeline view with tool blocks, retries, and status layers
- Shared `bridge-service` API and `windows-host` side panel prototype for Codex Windows integration
- QQ bridge now emits message-level inbound/outbound logs for easier diagnosis
- Windows supervisor fixed for PATH collisions and UTF-8 log reading

## Privacy

- No real API keys, QQ App ID, or QQ App Secret are included in this release
- Runtime config and message data remain outside the repository
- `.env`, `config.env`, runtime data, logs, and release artifacts are ignored at the repo level
